data.title: Trump Announces Historic Tax and Regulation Cuts Following Budget Resolution
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the budget resolution passed by the House of Representatives includes the largest tax cuts and regulatory reductions in history.
